title: Its Harness flow spec v0.2.0
description: Runtime-agnostic workflow specification for LangGraph, CrewAI, Mastra, and Microsoft Agent Framework adapters. v0.2.0 adds: agents[] registry, agent_role and agent_debate node types, context_from on edges, a2a_config and process_type in flow_config, and CrewAI memory tiers. Phase 0 Q&A decisions: AgentRoleNode.config adds memory_access/memory_store_id [Q28] and tool_approval [Q29]; MemoryStoreDef adds namespace [Q33]; ToolDef.mcp_server_url must reference env var [Q12].

spec_version.description: Spec schema version (semver). Adapters declare compatible ranges. Never remove or rename fields in minor versions.

id.description: Unique flow identifier in kebab-case. Used as the flow registry key and as the default filename stem.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown on the canvas title bar.

description.description: Optional prose description of what this flow does. Used in generated README and RFC docs.

state_schema.description: Shared state schema for the entire flow. All nodes read and write against this schema. Required for LangGraph adapter; used as a type reference in Mastra and SK adapters.

agents.description: Named agent persona definitions. Referenced by agent_role nodes via agent_ref. CrewAI native; LG/MA/MS adapters synthesise from these definitions.

nodes.description: All nodes in the flow. Must contain at least one input node and one output node.

edges.description: All directed edges between nodes. Every non-terminal node must have at least one outgoing edge.

tools.description: Named tool definitions. Keys are the tool identifiers referenced in tool_invoke and agent nodes.

memory_stores.description: Named memory store declarations. Keys are the store_id values used in memory_read, memory_write, rag_retrieval, and embed nodes.

model_defaults.description: Flow-level model defaults. Individual llm_call nodes may override any of these.

flow_config.description: Flow-level infrastructure config: checkpointing, streaming, and telemetry.

RuntimeHints.description: Non-binding hints about the target runtime. Harness uses preferred_adapter to set the default adapter selector. Adapters ignore fields they do not understand.

preferred_adapter.description: Adapter to use by default when generating code from this spec.

compatible.description: List of adapters this flow is compatible with. Harness warns when an incompatible adapter is selected.

python_version.description: Python version constraint for LangGraph, CrewAI, and MS AF Python adapters, e.g. '>=3.11'.

node_version.description: Node.js version constraint for Mastra adapter, e.g. '>=20'.

StateSchema.description: JSON Schema-compatible state declaration extended with reducer hints per field. LangGraph adapter translates reducer hints into Annotated[T, fn] types. Mastra and SK adapters use this as a type reference.

required.description: Fields that must be present in the initial state when the flow is invoked.

StateField.description: A single field in the flow state schema. Extends standard JSON Schema type definition with reducer and description.

type.description: JSON Schema primitive type(s) for this field.

description.description: Human-readable description of this state field. Used in generated type comments.

items.description: Schema for array item type when type is 'array'. Accepts a JSON Schema object.

properties.description: Nested property definitions when type is 'object'.

default.description: Default value for this field. Used by adapters to initialise state.

reducer.description: Merge strategy when multiple updates target this field in the same step. replace: last-write-wins (default). append: concatenate lists. merge: deep object merge. custom: uses reducer_fn_ref.

reducer_fn_ref.description: npm package ref (@scope/pkg/fn) or local path (./reducers/fn.ts) to a custom reducer function. Required when reducer is 'custom'.

Position.description: Canvas layout coordinates. Non-semantic — adapters MUST ignore this field when generating runtime code.

RuntimeSupportOverride.description: Per-node override of runtime support level. Harness uses this to show compatibility warnings. When absent, the node type's default support matrix applies.

OutputValidator.description: Post-execution output validation config. Runs after the node completes, before state is updated. LangGraph adapter injects a hidden __validator node; Mastra uses Processors; SK uses post-filter hooks.

fn_ref.description: npm package ref or local path to the validator function. Receives node output, returns {valid: boolean, reason?: string}.

on_fail.description: Behaviour on validation failure. raise: halt flow with error. retry: re-run node (Mastra native; LG/SK inject loop). skip: pass through without validation.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts when on_fail is 'retry'.

retry_prompt.description: Feedback appended to the prompt on retry, explaining why the previous output failed. Only applies to llm_call nodes.

StructuredOutput.description: Forces the LLM to return typed, validated JSON instead of free text. LangGraph: .with_structured_output(). Mastra: structuredOutput option on createStep(agent). SK: typed KernelFunction return / response_format.

schema.description: Inline JSON Schema object defining the required output shape. Use $defs in the flow spec for reusable types (v1 feature).

Condition.description: A branch condition. expr uses JSONPath (no-code, canvas expression builder). fn_ref uses a code reference (opens code panel).

type.description: expr: JSONPath expression evaluated against current state. fn_ref: reference to a function that receives state and returns boolean.

expr.description: JSONPath expression, e.g. '$.state.score > 0.8'. Required when type is 'expr'.

fn_ref.description: npm package ref or local path to an async condition function. Required when type is 'fn_ref'.

InputMapping.description: Maps state keys to node input parameters. Values are JSONPath expressions evaluated against current flow state, e.g. { 'query': '$.state.user_input' }.

OutputMapping.description: Maps node output fields to state keys. Keys are output field names from the node; values are the target state keys to write into.

id.description: Unique node identifier within this flow. Used as the variable/function name in generated code.

label.description: Display label shown on the canvas node chip. Defaults to id if absent.

description.description: Optional note about this node's purpose. Rendered as a code comment in generated output.

InputNode.description: Flow entry point. Declares the schema of data callers must provide when invoking the flow. LG: START node + StateGraph inputSchema. MA: workflow inputSchema. SK: initial KernelProcessEvent.Data.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema object defining the required input shape when the flow is invoked.

OutputNode.description: Flow exit point. A flow may have multiple output nodes for different exit paths (e.g. success, error). LG: END constant. MA: workflow outputSchema. SK: terminal event emission.

exit_code.description: Named exit path identifier. Used when a flow has multiple output nodes. e.g. 'success', 'error', 'escalate'.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema object defining the shape of the final flow output at this exit point.

LlmCallNode.description: Invokes a language model. Supports prompt templates with {{variable}} interpolation against current state, structured output mode, and per-node model overrides.

model.description: Model identifier in 'provider/model-name' format, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o'. Overrides model_defaults.model for this node.

system_prompt.description: System prompt string. Supports {{variable}} interpolation against current state.

prompt_template.description: User prompt template. Supports {{variable}} interpolation. Required.

model_params.description: Per-call model parameter overrides. Merged with model_defaults.model_params.

structured_output.description: When set, forces the model to return typed JSON matching the declared schema.

output_key.description: State key to write the model response into. Defaults to 'messages' when absent (appends to message list).

ToolInvokeNode.description: Executes a named tool from the flow's tools registry. Maps state to tool input and tool output back to state via JSONPath expressions.

tool_id.description: Key of the tool in the flow's top-level tools object.

input_map.description: Maps flow state paths to tool input parameters. Key: tool input param name. Value: JSONPath expression.

output_map.description: Maps tool output fields to flow state keys.

ConditionNode.description: Routes execution to one of several downstream nodes. Rendered as a diamond on canvas. LG: add_conditional_edges(). MA: .branch(). SK: emit different named events per branch.

target.description: ID of the destination node when this branch condition matches.

branches.description: Ordered list of condition-target pairs. First matching condition wins.

default_target.description: Node ID to route to when no branch condition matches. Required — prevents dead-ends.

ParallelForkNode.description: Splits execution into multiple concurrent branches. LG: Send() per target. MA: .parallel(). SK: Task.WhenAll / asyncio.gather. Always paired with a parallel_join node downstream.

targets.description: IDs of nodes to execute concurrently.

input_map.description: Optional per-branch input mappings. Keys are target node IDs. When absent, each branch receives the full current state.

ParallelJoinNode.description: Waits for parallel branches to complete and merges their outputs into shared state. Always paired with a parallel_fork node upstream.

oneOf.description: Wait for exactly N branches to complete.

wait_for.description: How many upstream branches must complete before the join fires. 'all': every branch. 'any': first branch. N: exactly N branches.

join_reducer.description: Strategy for combining branch outputs. merge: deep object merge. append: concatenate arrays. fn_ref: custom reducer function.

join_fn_ref.description: npm ref or local path to custom reducer. Required when join_reducer is 'fn_ref'.

output_key.description: State key to write the merged output into. When absent, merged result is spread directly into top-level state.

HitlBreakpointNode.description: Pauses flow execution pending human input. Harness shows a runtime capability warning for MA (no state editing) and SK (experimental). Requires a checkpointer/storage backend.

prompt.description: Message displayed to the human reviewer explaining what input or decision is needed.

resume_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the shape of data the human must provide when resuming the flow.

output_key.description: State key to write the human-provided resume data into.

timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before triggering on_timeout behaviour. null means no timeout.

on_timeout.description: Behaviour when timeout_seconds is exceeded. raise: halt flow with error. skip: continue without human input.

MemoryReadNode.description: Reads from a named memory store and writes the result into flow state. Supports key-value lookup and semantic similarity search.

store_id.description: Key of the memory store in the flow's top-level memory_stores object.

retrieval_mode.description: key_value: exact key lookup (all runtimes). semantic: vector similarity search (MA/SK native; LG via adapter plugin).

key_expr.description: JSONPath expression evaluating to the lookup key. Required when retrieval_mode is 'key_value'.

query_expr.description: JSONPath expression evaluating to the search query string. Required when retrieval_mode is 'semantic'.

top_k.description: Number of results to return. Applies to semantic mode only.

min_score.description: Minimum similarity score threshold for semantic results. Results below this threshold are excluded.

output_key.description: State key to write the retrieved value or results array into.

MemoryWriteNode.description: Writes a value from flow state into a named memory store.

store_id.description: Key of the memory store in the flow's top-level memory_stores object.

key_expr.description: JSONPath expression evaluating to the store key to write.

value_expr.description: JSONPath expression evaluating to the value to write.

write_mode.description: upsert: create if absent, update if present. overwrite: always replace existing value.

tier.description: CrewAI memory tier. short: ChromaDB within-task. long: SQLite cross-task. entity: named entity facts. user: cross-crew user preferences. LG/MA/MS adapters map to their nearest equivalent memory backend.

SubgraphNode.description: Embeds another registered flow as a single node. The referenced flow runs to completion before the parent flow continues. LG: add_node(name, compiled_subgraph). MA: createStep(innerWorkflow). SK: AddStepFromProcess().

flow_ref.description: ID of the referenced flow in the spec registry. Must resolve to a valid flow spec.

input_map.description: Maps parent flow state to the sub-flow's input schema.

output_map.description: Maps sub-flow output fields back into the parent flow's state.

TransformNode.description: Reshapes state data between nodes without calling an LLM or external service. MA: .map(fn). LG/SK: adapter inlines simple transforms into the preceding node function to keep generated code readable.

mode.description: mapping: declarative JSONPath key remapping (no-code, canvas form). fn_ref: custom function reference (code panel).

from.description: JSONPath expression to read from current state.

to.description: State key to write the value into.

mapping.description: Required when mode is 'mapping'. Array of from/to key remapping rules.

fn_ref.description: Required when mode is 'fn_ref'. npm ref or local path to transform function. Receives current state, returns partial state update.

DirectEdge.description: A fixed transition from one node to another. SK adapter: translates to emitEvent(label)/onEvent(label) pair. context_from injects upstream node outputs as context into the target node (CrewAI: Task.context; LG: injected into state.context; MA: step input mapping).

id.description: Optional edge identifier. Used as SK event name.

context_from.description: Optional list of node IDs whose outputs are injected as context into the target node. CrewAI adapter: Task.context=[upstream_tasks]. LG adapter: injected into state under 'context' key. MA adapter: mapped to step input parameters.

ConditionalEdge.description: An edge that routes to different targets based on conditions. Note: prefer using a condition node for complex routing. ConditionalEdge is a shorthand for simple two-branch cases.

default_target.description: Target node ID when no branch condition matches. Required.

ToolDef.description: A named tool available to the flow. Referenced by tool_id in tool_invoke nodes and by items in agent node tools arrays.

tool_ref.description: npm package reference '@scope/pkg/tool-name' or local path './tools/name.ts'. Implementation must export a function matching the input/output schemas.

source.description: Where the tool implementation lives. npm: resolved from node_modules. local: resolved relative to spec file. mcp: fetched from MCP server at mcp_server_url.

mcp_server_url.description: MCP server URL. Required when source is 'mcp'. Must always reference an environment variable — never hardcoded in the spec. MA: native. LG: langchain-mcp-adapters. MS: custom KernelFunction wrapper. CR: BaseTool bridge adapter (RFC open). [Q12]

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does. Used in LLM tool-call prompts if the tool_ref does not declare its own description.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for tool input. When absent, adapter reads schema from the tool implementation's export.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for tool output. When absent, adapter reads schema from the tool implementation's export.

MemoryStoreDef.description: Declares a named memory store. All memory_read, memory_write, rag_retrieval, and embed nodes reference stores by this key.

type.description: key_value: structured KV store (all runtimes). vector: embedding index for semantic search (MA/SK native; LG via adapter). hybrid: supports both modes.

backend.description: Storage backend. in_memory: ephemeral, dev/test only. Others: persistent. Adapter maps to the runtime's native storage plugin.

connection_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the connection string or API key. e.g. 'POSTGRES_URL'. Never hardcode credentials in the spec.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model for vector stores, e.g. 'openai/text-embedding-3-small'. Overrides model_defaults.embedding_model for this store.

dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimensions. Must match the embedding model's output dimensions.

scope.description: Isolation scope. thread: isolated per run_id. resource: shared across runs for the same user/resource. global: shared across all runs.

namespace.description: Optional partition key for vector stores. One store entry per namespace. If the namespace value contains sensitive routing information (e.g. a tenant ID), store it in an environment variable and reference the variable name here — never hardcode the value. [Q33]

ModelDefaults.description: Flow-level defaults for all LLM calls. Individual llm_call and agent nodes may override any field.

embedding_model.description: Default embedding model, e.g. 'openai/text-embedding-3-small'. Used by memory_read (semantic), rag_retrieval, and embed nodes.

ModelParams.description: LLM invocation parameters. All fields are optional overrides.

FlowConfig.description: Flow-level infrastructure configuration. All sections are optional.

process_type.description: CrewAI: maps to Crew(process=Process.sequential/hierarchical/consensual). Other adapters ignore this field. hierarchical requires a manager_agent_ref in the flow config.

manager_agent_ref.description: ID of the agent from agents[] who acts as manager in hierarchical process. Required when process_type is 'hierarchical'. CrewAI only.

CheckpointConfig.description: State persistence configuration. Required for hitl_breakpoint nodes and cross-session memory. LG: checkpointer. MA: storage backend. SK: Dapr/Orleans or custom IKernelProcessStorage plugin.

enabled.description: When false, no checkpoint is configured. Flow state is ephemeral.

backend.description: Checkpoint storage backend. in_memory: dev/test only, not persistent across restarts. dapr/orleans: SK cloud deployment only.

connection_env.description: Environment variable name holding the connection string. e.g. 'CHECKPOINT_DB_URL'.

namespace.description: Namespace prefix for checkpoint keys. Prevents collisions in shared databases. e.g. 'tenant-acme'.

StreamingConfig.description: Streaming output configuration. LG: stream() with mode. MA: run.watch() / run.stream(). SK: token-level streaming only — adapter implements a custom event emitter for 'updates' mode.

mode.description: updates: emit a structured event after each node completes (all runtimes). tokens: token-by-token LLM streaming (all runtimes). debug: emit checkpoint and task events (LG only; others log to telemetry).

AgentDef.description: Named agent persona definition. Lives in the top-level agents[] array. Referenced by agent_role nodes via agent_ref. CrewAI: maps directly to Agent(). LG: adapter synthesises a sub-graph with role/backstory/goal in system_prompt. MA: maps to new Agent(). MS: maps to ChatCompletionAgent / AssistantAgent.

id.description: Unique agent identifier within this flow. Referenced by agent_ref on agent_role and agent_debate nodes.

role.description: Job title / role label. CrewAI: Agent.role. LG: injected into system_prompt. MA/MS: used as agent name/instructions prefix.

backstory.description: Context and expertise background. CrewAI: Agent.backstory. Other adapters: injected into system_prompt.

goal.description: What this agent optimises for. CrewAI: Agent.goal. Other adapters: injected into system_prompt.

model.description: Model override for this agent in 'provider/model-name' format. Defaults to model_defaults.model.

tools.description: Tool IDs from the top-level tools registry available to this agent.

memory_config.description: Memory tier configuration. CrewAI native 4-tier model. Other adapters map to nearest equivalent.

short_term.description: Within-task working memory. CR: ChromaDB. LG: InMemoryStore. MA: workingMemory. MS: ChatHistory.

long_term.description: Cross-task persistence. CR: SQLite. LG: Postgres store. MA: semanticRecall. MS: SemanticTextMemory.

entity.description: Structured facts about named entities. CR native. Others: adapter approximation.

user.description: Cross-crew user preferences. CR native. Others: adapter approximation using global-scope memory store.

max_iter.description: Maximum tool-call iterations per task. CrewAI: Agent.max_iter. Other adapters: maps to max_iterations on the generated agent loop.

allow_delegation.description: Whether this agent can delegate tasks to other agents. CrewAI native. Other adapters ignore.

AgentRoleNode.description: Executes a named agent persona from the agents[] registry. LG: adapter expands to ReAct sub-graph with role/backstory/goal in system_prompt. CR: native Task with assigned Agent. MA: createStep(agent). MS: ChatCompletionAgent invocation.

agent_ref.description: ID of the agent in the top-level agents[] array.

task_description.description: What this agent should do. Supports {{variable}} interpolation against current state. CrewAI: Task.description. Others: injected into llm_call prompt.

expected_output.description: Description of what a good result looks like. CrewAI: Task.expected_output. Others: appended to prompt as output instructions.

async_execution.description: Whether this agent_role node may run concurrently with sibling nodes. CrewAI: Task.async_execution. Others: informs parallel_fork placement.

output_field.description: State key to write the agent's output into. If absent, defaults to node ID.

memory_access.description: isolated (default): agent memory is private; only the structured result written to output_field crosses into parent flow state. shared: agent reads/writes a named store also accessible to the parent flow. Harness validation error: async_execution:true + memory_access:'shared' is disallowed — parallel agents must be isolated. [Q28]

memory_store_id.description: Required when memory_access is 'shared'. Must reference a key in the flow's top-level memory_stores object. [Q28]

tool_approval.description: auto (default): agent executes all tool calls without pausing. human: adapter synthesises an approval gate before each tool call, reusing the shared HITL checkpoint/resume mechanism (same plumbing as hitl_breakpoint). Manual wiring is not possible for runtime-determined tool calls. [Q29]

AgentDebateNode.description: Multi-agent conversational loop. Agents take turns until a termination condition fires. MS native (AutoGen GroupChat / SK AgentGroupChat). LG/CR/MA adapters synthesise. Harness shows prominent warning badge for non-MS adapters.

agents.description: IDs of agents from the top-level agents[] array participating in the debate.

max_rounds.description: Maximum conversation turns before forceful termination.

termination_condition.description: Condition evaluated after each turn. When true, the debate ends. Supports expr (JSONPath) and fn_ref.

speaker_selection.description: How the next speaker is chosen. auto: LLM decides. round_robin: cycle through agents list. custom: fn_ref provided. MS: maps to SelectionStrategy. LG/MA/CR: adapter generates routing logic.

speaker_selection_fn_ref.description: npm ref or local path to custom speaker selection function. Required when speaker_selection is 'custom'.

allow_repeat_speaker.description: Whether the same agent can speak twice in a row. MS: AgentGroupChat setting. Others: adapter enforces.

output_field.description: State key to write the final conversation output into.

A2AConfig.description: Configuration for exposing this flow as an A2A-compatible agent endpoint. When enabled, the adapter generates an HTTP wrapper serving an AgentCard at /.well-known/agent.json and a /tasks/send endpoint. All four runtime adapters must implement this as a wrapper layer — no runtime natively speaks A2A yet.

capabilities.description: A2A capability flags declared in AgentCard. streaming: SSE event stream. pushNotifications: webhook callbacks. stateTransitionHistory: expose run state transitions.

authentication.description: Authentication scheme declared in AgentCard. Adapter generates corresponding middleware. Credentials always from env vars — never hardcoded.

input_schema_ref.description: ID of the input node whose output_schema defines the A2A Task input Part schema.

output_schema_ref.description: ID of the output node whose input_schema defines the A2A Artifact Part schema.

skills.description: Skills declared in AgentCard. Each skill represents a capability the agent can perform.

TelemetryConfig.description: Observability and tracing configuration. LG: LangSmith via LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2. MA: Langfuse via LangfuseIntegration. MS: Azure Monitor via OpenTelemetry. All providers: traces appear in their respective dashboards without adapter code changes.

provider.description: Telemetry provider. langsmith: LangSmith (LG native; others via opentelemetry-langchain). langfuse: Langfuse (all runtimes). otel: generic OpenTelemetry endpoint. azure_monitor: Azure Application Insights (MS native).

project.description: Project or dataset name in the telemetry provider. LangSmith: LANGCHAIN_PROJECT. Langfuse: project name.

endpoint_env.description: Environment variable name holding the telemetry endpoint URL or API key. e.g. 'LANGSMITH_API_KEY', 'LANGFUSE_HOST'. Never hardcode credentials.

trace_all_nodes.description: When true, every node execution is traced as a child span. When false, only llm_call and tool_invoke nodes emit spans.
